title: Chatless
description: A plugin for customizing chat without unnecessary features.
body:
**Chatless** is an ordinary, typical plugin for chat rooms, of which there are many, but it lacks unnecessary features such as "Color Chat" and the like, when developing the plugin I adhered to minimalism.

The main functions of the plugin are:
1. Creating and customizing chats in a configuration file.
2. System of personal chat settings (capitalization of messages, automatic substitution of a dot at the end of a message, deletion of swears in chat) - **/chatsettings**
3. Message system - **/tell**, **/reply**
4. Chat spy system for administration - **/spy**
5. Customization of absolutely all plugin messages via configuration file.
6. PlaceholderAPI support.
7. AdvancedBan (and other ban-system plugins) support.

**I hope you enjoy it.**
